title: rubus oegoacanthus
intro: Rubus oegoacanthus, also known as Himalayan Raspberry, is a species of flowering plant in the rose family, native to the Himalayas. The leaves and roots of Rubus oegoacanthus have been traditionally used in Ayurvedic medicine for their medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antibacterial, and antiviral effects. The health benefits of Rubus oegoacanthus include its ability to reduce fever, alleviate digestive issues, and support the immune system. The herbal preparations of Rubus oegoacanthus include teas, tinctures, and infusions, which can be consumed for its medicinal and health benefits.
